candidates.text: This guy found a fun way to turn an ordinary tip into something his waitress will remember for a long time. candidates.query: what should we eat for dinner lang:en -crypto -bitcoin -solana -ethereum -airdrop -giveaway -retweet -repost -follow -grok -election -president -war -killed -shooting -dress -outfit -nails -wedding
candidates.text: Elon Musk told a story that should terrify every AI company on Earth. His son Saxon is autistic. Saxon couldn’t understand why the family went to restaurants. You can get the same food delivered. You can call your friends over. You can eat better at home for half the price. So why go? Musk: “He had an epiphany and said, ‘Oh, the reason people go to restaurants is to hang out with strangers.’” A kid who takes the world literally just decoded something the rest of us never thought to question....

candidates.text: Just me who’s only slightly annoyed at Tuchel? Absolutely got the subs/approach wrong, but hindsight is 20/20. Argentina hadn’t really threatened *in waves* before 70 mins or so. If we lock it down then everyone is lauding it like they did against Mexico. We all cheered at Dan Burn 😁 Difference is the greatest player of all time, possibly the greatest sportsman ever, starts ticking and we look a bit out of ideas. Seeing “got the tournament all wrong”… did he? The biggest issue for me was Eng...
